verse_text: Now the sons of Reuben and the sons of Gad had a very great multitude of cattle, and they saw the land of Jazer and the land of Gilead; and they saw the place was a place for cattle.

pericope.title: The Tribes East of the Jordan River

links.context: The veil speaks of the hidden mysteries of God in the Church. According to Scripture, Mount Gilead had exceptionally good pasture ([[NUM.32:1]]), again looking ahead to the Church.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
